problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Stem. Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
